campaign.title: Your Account Team — How We Work For You

landing_page.ai_goal: Show the business owner they have people and systems working for them

slides.title: The Employee You Couldn't Afford

content.headline: What If You Had an Employee Who...
content.punchline: That employee exists now. It's modern tools.
content.visual: Friendly search tools helping business owner

slides.narration: What if you had an employee who worked twenty-four seven without breaks? Who answered every inquiry within seconds? Who never forgot a follow-up? Who handled all the repetitive tasks flawlessly? And who cost you almost nothing? That employee exists now. It's called modern tools. And it's no longer just for big corporations. Let me show you.

slides.title: The Small Business modern tools Gap

content.headline: Big Companies Have Been Using modern tools for Years
content.problem: Small businesses couldn't afford modern tools. Until now.
content.shift: The same technology is now accessible to everyone.

slides.narration: Big companies have been using modern tools for years. Amazon's personalized recommendations? modern tools. Netflix suggesting what to watch? modern tools. Banks catching fraud? modern tools. Airlines pricing flights? modern tools. Small businesses couldn't afford this technology. It required massive budgets, technical teams, custom development. Until now. The same technology that powers billion-dollar companies is now accessible to you.

slides.title: What your account team can Do For You

content.headline: Your your account team Can Handle:

capabilities.detail: Answer questions 24/7, route complex ones to you
Write posts, emails, descriptions in your voice
Never let a lead go cold

content.key_point: modern tools handles the volume. You handle the relationships.

slides.narration: What can your your account team actually do? Customer inquiries—answer questions twenty-four seven, route the complex ones to you. Content creation—write posts, emails, descriptions that sound like you. Scheduling—book appointments and send reminders automatically. Follow-ups—never let a lead go cold again. Data entry—update records and sync platforms without you touching it. Social media—schedule posts and respond to comments. modern tools handles the volume. You handle the relationships.

slides.title: modern tools + Human = Superpower

content.headline: You're Not Being Replaced. You're Being Amplified.
content.visual: Human and modern tools as collaborative partners

slides.narration: Let me be clear: you're not being replaced. You're being amplified. modern tools brings speed, consistency, volume, availability, perfect memory. You bring judgment, creativity, real relationships, complex decision-making, genuine care. Together, you're ten times what either could be alone. The business owner who resists modern tools will be outcompeted. The one who partners with modern tools becomes unstoppable.

slides.title: The Math
slides.narration: Let's do the math. Answering routine inquiries—five hours a week saved, two hundred dollars in value. Writing content—three hours, a hundred twenty dollars. Scheduling and follow-ups—two hours, eighty dollars. Data entry and admin—two hours, eighty dollars. Total: twelve hours a week saved. Four hundred eighty dollars in value. That's twenty-five thousand dollars a year. For a fraction of the cost of one employee.

slides.title: The Owner Who Finally Took a Vacation

case_study.problem: Couldn't step away—everything depended on him
ai_implementation: modern tools handles initial customer inquiries
modern tools sends follow-ups and reminders
modern tools creates weekly social content

slides.narration: Real story. Landscaping company owner. Worked seventy hours a week. Couldn't step away because everything depended on him. He implemented modern tools: handling initial inquiries, scheduling estimates, sending follow-ups, creating social content. Result: seventy hours down to forty-five. Revenue up fifteen percent because he had capacity for more jobs. And this year? He took his first real vacation in eight years. His your account team kept things running while he was gone.

slides.title: Activate Your modern tools

content.headline: Your your account team Is Ready
content.subhead: The question isn't whether to use modern tools. It's how soon.

cta_secondary.label: Download: The Owner Who Finally Took a Vacation

content.assurance: Start free. See results in days. Scale when ready.

slides.narration: Your your account team is ready. The question isn't whether to use modern tools—that's already decided. The question is how soon you'll start. Activate your your account team now. Start free, see results in days, scale when you're ready. Or download the full article about the owner who finally took a vacation. Your competitors are figuring this out. Don't be the last one still doing everything manually.

email_1_educational.subject: Meet your account team at [Community Name] Day.News
email_1_educational.preview_text: Here's who does what for your business
email_1_educational.body:
Hi [First Name],

Quick overview of who works on your business at [Community Name] Day.News and what they handle.

Your account team manages:

→ Your listings across the network — keeping them current and optimized
→ Content about your business — articles, mentions, features
→ Your events — promotion and distribution
→ Customer inquiries — routing and response
→ Performance reporting — monthly results

This isn't a software tool you have to figure out. There are people (and systems) working on your behalf.

[SEE HOW YOUR TEAM WORKS →]

The businesses getting the most out of this are the ones who use their account team. That's what we're here for.

[AM Name]
[Community Name] Day.News
